federation.note: The RDF vocab + types for vector drawings / whiteboards — the data model for an Excalidraw→Solid fork. A draw:Scene descriptor points (draw:sceneDocument) at a byte-exact .excalidraw JSON blob; the canvas is opaque, never shredded into triples. Mints exactly five terms under https://w3id.org/jeswr/drawing#; reuses dct/schema/prov. draw:Scene is rdfs:subClassOf schema:CreativeWork and gufo:SubKind of core:InformationResource — the same convention the other @jeswr sector vocabs follow; the solid-federation-vocab drawing# alignments reference these IRIs. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish is a deferred migration.
